name: suwol-view
description: Free open-source cross-platform image, comic, webtoon, and metadata viewer.
author: SuwolView contributors

scripts.build:main: vite build --config vite.main.config.ts && vite build --config vite.preload.config.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.dist:win:zip: npm run build && electron-builder --win zip --publish never
scripts.dist:linux:zip: npm run build && electron-builder --linux zip --publish never
scripts.dist:linux:release: npm run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage tar.gz --publish never
scripts.dist:linux:dir: npm run build && electron-builder --linux dir --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:release: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --arm64 --publish never
scripts.verify: npm run icons:check && npm run i18n:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run license:check && npm run package:smoke
